interaction_phrase: The interdisciplinary Leibniz Institutes conduct research
occurrence_sentence: The interdisciplinary Leibniz Institutes conduct research in the three main areas of quantum communication, quantum metrology and sensor technology, and quantum computing, as well as on 'enabling' technologies, in particular photonics, laser, microwave, signal and cryogenics, control electronics, integrated systems and new software algorithms.

interaction_phrase: The Leibniz Institutes also supply
occurrence_sentence: The Leibniz Institutes also supply European research institutes with critical material systems such as isotopically pure semiconductors, therefore making an important contribution to increasing the resilience of the European Research Area.

interaction_phrase: With the help of innovative processes and process technologies, as well as through modelling and simulation, it is possible to design and develop new components: electronic or opto-electronic semiconductor components, multi-qubit circuits, quantum sensors and detectors, qubit control, drive and readout circuits.
occurrence_sentence: With the help of innovative processes and process technologies, as well as through modelling and simulation, it is possible to design and develop new components: electronic or opto-electronic semiconductor components, multi-qubit circuits, quantum sensors and detectors, qubit control, drive and readout circuits.

interaction_phrase: Individual Leibniz institutes master the systemic and hybrid integration of these components
occurrence_sentence: Individual Leibniz institutes master the systemic and hybrid integration of these components and enable proof-of-concept demonstrators, complex systems and industrial-grade prototypes up to small-scale production.

interaction_phrase: the institutes are researching photonic modules
occurrence_sentence: With regard to the tap-proof transmission of encrypted information, the institutes are researching photonic modules and their microintegration in the field of quantum communication.

interaction_phrase: research is undertaken to develop atomic quantum sensors
occurrence_sentence: In respect of quantum metrology and sensor technology for navigation, the synchronization of networks, medical diagnostics and highly sensitive imaging techniques, research is undertaken to develop atomic quantum sensors, quantum sensors based on optically pumped magnetometers and defect centres, as well as sensory surfaces.

interaction_phrase: universities of the German Armed Forces

interaction_phrase: on a national level
occurrence_sentence: The Leibniz Institutes are involved on a national level in relevant projects, such as the Excellence Hub ct.qmat – Complexity and Topology in Quantum Matter, the Research Factory Microelectronics Germany, QSolid – Quantum Computers in the Solid State, MU-NIQC-SC – Munich Quantum Valley Quantum Computer Demonstrators – Superconducting Qubits, or QYRO – Nuclear Spin-based quantum gyroscopes for new space applications, as well as an international level, for example, at BECCAL – Bose-Einstein Condensate and Cold Atom Lab on the International Space Station.
